judge_reason: Description A claims the file folder has no text, while Description B claims it has a stamped red label with specific text ('ENCLOSURE 1', '3894-158'), indicating a direct contradiction on the presence of quoted text.
original_image_tags: A blank, manila-colored file folder, aged and slightly wrinkled. The folder is presented vertically against a solid black background. At the top, a tab is folded down. The body of the folder is mostly empty, with three punched holes visible at the bottom edge. There is a single hole punch at the top center of the tab.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A blank tan manila file folder or envelope, shown front-on, with a round hole near the top center and two holes near the bottom, stamped “ENCLOSURE 1” and handwritten red number “3894-158” on the upper right.*
